result:
All results are under `src/`, matching the earlier list, one include each (no duplicates/comments).

**答案:70 個 .c 檔案直接 `#include "server.h"`。**

清單(全部位於 `src/` 下,皆為單一 include):

acl.c, aof.c, bio.c, bitops.c, blocked.c, call_reply.c, childinfo.c, cluster_asm.c, cluster_legacy.c, cluster.c, commands.c, config.c, connection.c, crc16.c, db.c, debug.c, defrag.c, entry.c, estore.c, eval.c, evict.c, expire.c, fwtree.c, gcra.c, hotkeys.c, hyperloglog.c, iothread.c, keymeta.c, latency.c, lazyfree.c, logreqres.c, lolwut.c, lolwut5.c, lolwut6.c, lolwut8.c, memory_prefetch.c, module.c, multi.c, networking.c, notify.c, object.c, pubsub.c, rdb.c, redis-check-aof.c, redis-check-rdb.c, replication.c, resp_parser.c, rio.c, script_lua.c, script.c, sentinel.c, server.c, slowlog.c, socket.c, sort.c, sparkline.c, sparsearray.c, syncio.c, t_array.c, t_hash.c, t_list.c, t_set.c, t_stream.c, t_string.c, t_zset.c, threads_mngr.c, timeout.c, tls.c, tracking.c, unix.c

(以 `grep -rl '#include "server.h"' --include='*.c' .` 直接掃描原始碼取得,並逐筆核對每個檔案僅出現一次 include,無註解掉或重複的情況。)
